_comment: Copy to config.json (gitignored). Each camera is EITHER a full stream `url` (any RTSP/RTSPS/HTTP — UniFi, Reolink, Frigate, ONVIF...), OR an `id` built into a URL via `urlTemplate` + `nvr` (default template is UniFi Protect). `device`/`dial` target the HID dial; run `node index.js --learn` and turn the dial to discover codes.
